Fire Without Roots.name: Fire Without Roots
Fire Without Roots.description: Jet Dragon Flame deals 150% base damage to enemies within a 200 range + 20% additional damage based on the current enemy's health (additional damage cap 50000)

Dual-phase Dragon Scale.name: Dual-phase Dragon Scale
Dual-phase Dragon Scale.description: When taking damage, there is a 50% chance to reduce the damage by 99 %.
